subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! For some time I have not conversed with thee. In this too there is wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب نفحات الله شد مدتی که با تو گفت و شنیدی نکرده ام این را نیز حکمتی
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @service to others; to the Cause of God
